name: US Cash Advance
description_short: St Paul's US Cash Advance at 238 6th St E offers same-day payday loans and title loans.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates at 238 6th St E in St Paul, MN. The standalone storefront is located near downtown St Paul and is open Monday–Friday 8AM–9PM and Saturday–Sunday 10AM–7PM. St Paul residents rely on this location for convenient access to fast cash solutions.

At this location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances. The St Paul team processes applications quickly—many borrowers receive approval and funding the same day. Call +1 651-661-5016 to discuss loan options, or visit in person to start your application.

To apply in St Paul, MN, bring a valid government ID, proof of income, and banking information. The application process is straightforward and designed to be fast. Whether you need emergency cash or unexpected bill help, the 238 6th St E location serves the St Paul area with quick decisions.
pros: Same-day loan approval and funding available for qualifying applicants
Accepts all credit types including bad credit with no credit check required
Unsecured loans requiring no collateral or vehicle title
Extended operating hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) for convenience
In-person service reportedly completed in under 45 minutes according to customer reviews
Staff documented as transparent about repayment terms with no hidden fees mentioned
Loan amounts up to $50,000 available for bad credit products
cons: APR and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website, making true cost comparison impossible
Operates in high-cost payday lending sector associated with predatory lending concerns
Business model targets financially vulnerable consumers in urgent situations
No online pre-approval option available; customers must apply online or visit in-person
Limited waiting area space noted by customer as cramped
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history who need cash within hours for emergency expenses
Individuals unable to qualify for traditional bank loans and facing time-sensitive financial situations
People willing to pay premium rates for same-day loan access without collateral requirements
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for consumers in genuine financial emergencies who lack access to traditional credit and need funds within hours, not days. The critical caveat is that payday loans carry substantially higher costs than traditional lending—the company's website omits APR disclosure, making it essential that borrowers understand the true cost and short repayment timeline before committing, as these products can create debt cycles rather than solve financial problems.
meta_description: St Paul, MN US Cash Advance (238 6th St E) — same-day payday and title loans.
